<!-- markdownlint-disable-file -->

Thanks for the contribution. This project runs a **default-closed** policy:
newly opened issues and PRs are closed automatically to manage AI-generated
submission volume.

To have this reconsidered, **reply here** with some context — what you were
trying to do, why it matters, and (for bugs) how to reproduce it — or email
the maintainer. A substantive reply is all it takes; see
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.

This isn't a judgment on your contribution; it's a volume filter. Sorry for the
friction, and thanks for understanding.
